---
title: "Lecture 3"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
---

# Lecture 3 {#lecture3}

## Overview

Notes from Lecture 3 of Applied Computational Analysis.

*Note: This section should be filled in based on the content from `lecture-notes/Lecture3.pdf`.*

## Key Topics

<!-- Add key topics covered in this lecture -->

## Main Content

<!-- Add detailed notes from the lecture -->

## Examples and Exercises

<!-- Add examples and exercises from the lecture -->

## Summary

<!-- Add a summary of the main points covered -->

---
